title: Artifacts in Claude Code: share your work as it happens
summary: Claude Artifacts is a feature that transforms raw AI-generated output such as data, mockups, and JSON into visual pages shareable with team members. It is available in beta for Team and Enterprise plans of Claude.
writeup: This video covers Artifacts in Claude Code, a feature that converts raw output such as data, mockups, and JSON into shareable visual pages. The feature is in beta on Team and Enterprise plans and supports generating interactive artifacts in any session. The point is to turn working output into visualizations that can be shared as work happens.
